open_items.action: Revisit EIP-7688 inclusion in devnet-7 and builder API testing scope at ACDC Thursday
open_items.notes: ACDT #87 confirms devnet-7 launched with EIP-7688 (stable containers) included, but no explicit mention of builder API testing scope being revisited at ACDC. The action's ACDC discussion component remains unconfirmed.

open_items.action: Draft EIP cleanup PRs (execution gas rename, log cost consolidation) for devnet-8
open_items.notes: Devnet-8 is discussed in ACDT #88 as upcoming (~1-2 weeks) with focus on repricing EIP cleanups, but no confirmation that Maria's PRs were drafted.

open_items.action: Align BAL-related JSON RPC methods across EL clients before devnet-8; review Toni's execution-apis PR
open_items.notes: Devnet-8 timeline is ~1-2 weeks from July 20. No later meeting confirms completion of this alignment work.

open_items.action: Formally move devnet-7 EIPs to SFI at next ACDE/ACDC call
open_items.notes: Target was 'next ACDE/ACDC Thursday' which would be July 24/25, 2026. As of July 23 (today), this action is still pending the upcoming call.

resolved_items.action: Felix to add disable-switch to EIP-8282 deposit contract (easy, low-risk future-proofing)
resolved_items.resolution: ACDT #87 confirms devnet-7 launched with EIP-8282 contract deployed, indicating the finalized contract spec (including any disable-switch) was implemented.

resolved_items.action: Revert Besu fix for Prysm FCU behavior; re-investigate if issues persist
resolved_items.resolution: ACDT #87 shows devnet-6 running at 80%+ participation with only minor Lodestar-related issues; the Besu/Prysm FCU issue appears resolved.

resolved_items.action: Resolve remaining EL spec changes (EIP-2780 floor gas input, EIP-8037, EIP-8282) in EL breakout; release updated execution-specs by Wednesday
resolved_items.resolution: ACDT #87 reports EL tests release 7.2 deployed with EIP-8037 fix included, and devnet-7 launched with all three EIPs, confirming spec updates were completed.
